title: [Sylinar's Spire, Conical Summit]
description: Exposed rafters support a conical roof of fresh thatch, its structure rising overhead and lending the space a warm, rustic scent.  Wide windows stand open to the surrounding grounds, letting in clean air and unbroken views of the grounds beyond the tower.  At center, a hot-bellied cast iron stove rests upon a stone pad, its curved chimney snaking upward along the wall before disappearing through the roof.  Nearby, a spiraling stone staircase descends only, its curve dropping away into the levels below.
